title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 194.307 - Effective date for sections 194.240, 194.297 through 194.304 and section 302.171
text:
194.307.  Effective date for sections 194.240, 194.297 through 194.304 and section 302.171. — Sections 194.240, 194.297 to 194.304 and section 302.171 shall become effective January 1, 1996.
(L. 1995 H.B. 178 § B)
